# Brian W. Locke research index

This file is a machine-readable guide to public research code, teaching materials, and publication-support repositories maintained by Brian W. Locke.

Canonical website: https://reblocke.github.io/
GitHub profile: https://github.com/reblocke
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3588-5238
Repository audit manifest: https://reblocke.github.io/research_repository_audit.csv
Human-readable repository page: https://reblocke.github.io/research-repositories/

## Public publication-linked repositories

- NRH-SCI-Vent: code for post-acute ventilator weaning and discharge outcomes in cervical spinal cord injury. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/NRH-SCI-Vent. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1177/19433654261428406. Author response DOI: https://doi.org/10.1177/19433654261450544.
- AOM-and-Bari-Surg-for-OSA-SRMA: code and extraction tables for a systematic review and meta-analysis of anti-obesity medications, bariatric surgery, and apnea-hypopnea index in obstructive sleep apnea. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/AOM-and-Bari-Surg-for-OSA-SRMA. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1111/obr.13697. PubMed Central: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11311115/.
- vr_icu: code and materials for an immersive virtual reality feasibility study in the medical ICU. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/vr_icu. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.2196/62842.
- hickams-dictum: code and data for Hickam's Dictum: An Analysis of Multiple Diagnoses. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/hickams-dictum. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1007/s11606-024-09120-y.
- CSA-CPAP-Prescribing: Stata code supporting predictors of initial CPAP prescription and subsequent course with CPAP in central sleep apnea. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/CSA-CPAP-Prescribing. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1007/s00408-023-00657-z.
- CPAPOutcomes: analysis for EHR-derived outcomes in obstructive sleep apnea managed with positive airway pressure adherence tracking systems. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/CPAPOutcomes. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.5664/jcsm.9750.
- NHPI-OSA-Burden: Stata code for severity, comorbidities, and adherence to therapy in Native Hawaiians/Pacific Islanders with obstructive sleep apnea. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/NHPI-OSA-Burden. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.5664/jcsm.10472.
- CTPA-Dose-Response: files for pulmonary artery size on CT pulmonary angiography and mortality. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/CTPA-Dose-Response. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1002/pul2.12225.
- Hypercap-Case-Definitions: Stata code for consistency of hypercapnic respiratory failure case definitions in EHR data. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/Hypercap-Case-Definitions. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chest.2025.08.002.
- Splenectomy-PE: analysis code for pulmonary embolism location, splenectomy, and CTEPH risk. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/Splenectomy-PE. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1002/pul2.70231.
- code-seminar-analysis: materials and analysis for inpatient emergency leadership curriculum evaluation. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/code-seminar-analysis. Abstract DOI: https://doi.org/10.1164/ajrccm.2025.211.Abstracts.A5624.

## Public methods, tools, and teaching repositories

- notebooks_dx_reasoning: interactive notebooks and Binder/Voila apps for Bayesian diagnostic reasoning and log-odds evidence. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/notebooks_dx_reasoning.
- clinical_talks: rendered clinical teaching talks and supporting source materials. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/clinical_talks.
- U-of-U-IM-Codes-and-Rapid-Responses: course website and materials for code blue and rapid-response team leadership. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/U-of-U-IM-Codes-and-Rapid-Responses. Site: https://reblocke.github.io/U-of-U-IM-Codes-and-Rapid-Responses/.
- intro_clin_research: guide for students, residents, and fellows starting clinical research. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/intro_clin_research.
- fellow_stats: pulmonary and critical care statistics workshop materials. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/fellow_stats.
- stata-codex-skills: generated local Codex skills for Stata. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/stata-codex-skills.
- conf_curve_likelihood: confidence curve and profile-likelihood visualization tools. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/conf_curve_likelihood.
- stewart-light: Stewart-Light acid-base visualization tools. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/stewart-light.
- forensic_metascience: forensic science replication and metascience materials. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/forensic_metascience.
- sofa_resp_sim: simulation of SOFA respiratory score generation from EHR data at elevation. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/sofa_resp_sim.
- sodium_change: program to evaluate how likely two sodium values represent a real clinical change. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/sodium_change.
- dx_chat_entropy: code to analyze clinical-reasoning efficiency via chatbot interactions. Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/dx_chat_entropy.

## Copyright and data-use notes

Public repositories may contain code, de-identified derived tables, teaching materials, or study-level extraction data. Restricted clinical datasets, PHI, internal grant drafts, and publisher PDFs are intentionally not indexed here. When manuscript text is unavailable as an author-owned accepted version or an open-access full text, use the DOI, PubMed, PubMed Central, repository README, and `CITATION.cff` instead of inferring details from a publisher PDF.
